subject: Border Patrol chief: Our national security is at risk
body:
If there was ever a moment for a sense of urgency from Washington about America’s border crisis, that time would be now. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=630421123c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 9, 2019
---
| | |
# **Border Patrol chief: Our national security is at risk**

**If there was** **ever** a moment for a sense of urgency from Washington about America’s border crisis, that time is now.

**“As of Sunday,** only seven months into the year, we have now surpassed the total southwest border apprehensions of every fiscal year since 2009,” U.S. Border Patrol Chief Carla Provost told members of a U.S. Senate Judiciary subcommittee yesterday.
**🎬****Watch:** [Border Patrol chief explains our immigration crisis in 6 minutes](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8100bc62d&e=3ee4985eea)
**Because of dangerous loopholes** in American immigration laws, today “family units” and unaccompanied children account for 64 percent of all apprehensions at the southern border. Illegal immigrants and human smugglers “have received the message loud and clear,” Provost says.

**“Bring a child** —you will be released.”

**That policy** creates an unmitigated humanitarian and security disaster. One problem is that illegal immigration is dangerous and often relies on criminal smugglers to breach the border. Bringing young children along in that journey puts them at grave risk.

**An even more pressing** danger comes from “fake families”—a growing phenomenon where children are unwillingly paired with nonparent adults to game U.S. asylum laws. Once entry is granted, those children become expendable, sometimes being appallingly “recycled” back across the border for use by another asylum-seeker.

**Congress needs to take action** —and that doesn’t simply mean building more temporary facilities, Provost said. “It’s like holding a bucket under a faucet. It doesn't matter how many buckets you give me if we can't turn off the flow.”

[President Trump is calling on Congress to respond to this humanitarian crisis.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a27ec6f3ba&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [Feds released 168,000 illegal immigrant family members into communities](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1890d8b26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump hosts the 2018 World Series Champion Boston Red Sox**

**A time-honored** tradition took place at the White House today as President Trump welcomed last year’s World Series baseball champions, the Boston Red Sox.

**The Red Sox** have been one of America’s most storied franchises. In 2004, they captivated the Nation by rallying for the biggest playoff comeback in baseball history, defeating the New York Yankees in the American League Championship Series. A near-century long championship drought ended as they went on to win the title that year.

**And in** **2013** , the Red Sox brought unity and joy to a Boston community still healing after the tragic events of the Boston Marathon bombing that April, winning the organization’s eighth championship that fall.

[Watch President Trump welcome the 2018 champion Boston Red Sox.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c31340d1d&e=3ee4985eea)

name: America Next
subject: Fwd: Teacher Appreciation Week needs to be about more than words
body:
With your support we can make real positive changes for students and teachers nationwide.
Hello Everyone,

We hope you were able to see our message yesterday about the American Next K-12 Education Reform proposal. We need your support to help make it a reality.

Students across the country are suffering due to poor education systems, and we cannot stand by and allow it to continue. America Next has a plan to improve our schools, but getting our message to policymakers across the nation won’t be easy,

**However, with your support we can make real positive changes for students and teachers nationwide.**

[If you want to see education back in the hands of our communities, join our mission by donating whatever you can to America Next today.](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=9f56537d40834998b07de37983b0056c&_e=fmXdSrgAUBIffndq3y-dsuEJiSOgLtJxijeEL3eXy7ISXCxcjSnOvJzxERJlXqVQZkgGkDvVL23sKbK3QHpVvXPVz6Bndop6k0Y_yY0iaYz4phKVuGFKjK0VhhpXoRIt9SqXSNMzyoBM2MoCex7ug-yWQyti37NdKnoPSxMU2AKptXob-sHC4CrFR5iMAu3UjePBGDXTzIXs3Rys_HHYfuU-eIqM6atjbV84OZTYC7lg4Bx8ulSigpZ5hvmu5IEkJVsBRC7yFpa6Iz4yexDPXxO1arN0VJSPuzXizO3MGmqKmKV3fiQSvC7cO7FfMqd9kI1zIPT-bYrmgk9m0Pm9j8kUWbfDIZzjF386CbOwfOU9aEfgsqizgpQ-5llDj5wrk8vqwmHl_vyZrmVNO2IIuQ%3D%3D) Our schools, our communities and our children are counting on us; we can’t afford to wait any longer.

[https://secure.anedot.com/americanext/c1e956397fe7d1ecf9fdb/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=9f56537d40834998b07de37983b0056c&_e=fmXdSrgAUBIffndq3y-dsuEJiSOgLtJxijeEL3eXy7ISXCxcjSnOvJzxERJlXqVQZkgGkDvVL23sKbK3QHpVvXPVz6Bndop6k0Y_yY0iaYz4phKVuGFKjK0VhhpXoRIt9SqXSNMzyoBM2MoCex7ug-yWQyti37NdKnoPSxMU2AKptXob-sHC4CrFR5iMAu3UPOqF8QqNNbeqXpLktNBHbU8QDZ4njrJuU_73Udy_VCQbm3ag8b_Olt67uRlb6s2xo25a9v-JRuD-wbzLV-bSn290ZIqz93jERmo-ZBqkfMpLINrA2jOoGKCbrEKWdG47uPgHhATF0XyW8js6YtMaYmlfq6OG6oRshejPWEjG2WYuDx36px206KqVAzP7rX41OWsKVWQ1O26O8xFalxkosw%3D%3D)

Thank you for being on the team.

**\-------Forwarded Message-------**
**From** : Bobby Jindal
**To** : team
**Date** : May 9, 2019
**Subject** : Teacher Appreciation Week needs to be about more than words
Teacher Appreciation Week is a reminder of all that teachers do for our children, and it’s also a reminder of the importance of maintaining high standards in education systems nationwide.

Unfortunately, while teachers work hard and do the best they can, many are hindered by failing education systems. In fact, despite massive increases in education spending over the last three decades, 58% of Americans think the curriculum used in their community’s schools needs to change.

These children are our future, and we need to give them the best chance we can. **More money, more government, and more union power have only made these problems worse;_we need real reforms to solve our education crisis._**

Here at America Next, we’ve created a K-12 Education Reform proposal. It’s a community-driven plan that gives parents and educators the freedom to cater to their students’ unique needs while holding every education system to high standards that will ensure students succeed.

We need to get the government, unions, and bureaucracy off the backs of teachers and parents, and bring education back to its primary job - to nurture the growth of students in every community.

[If you’d like to learn more about the America Next K-12 Education Reform Proposal, click here](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=9f56537d40834998b07de37983b0056c&_e=fmXdSrgAUBIffndq3y-dsiMBJNRZnZ314LAwI28G5o2zKsLwhHOZPEgncQXBX_CvB-fkspK8y4VYG6Q4x8FpECabpPs6WGBBm5VMhKOGVxTpqVtxZ90OfjCphHQRxzMjnMvkZi_4Sef478m6ESy5V-3QkrICyk0fajlTvjfWuZM33eR-xcAAVIQBBybI3mamW1wg6w_OmqJZXPyGHypKz54W_a4-Ke5uHgCABNmf3PPYV1k6_jSqOhkZ_wtRYfTAZtUv8vwBwxXyDUXQW3Wg1vwTjzLV67DyJmgwDeb8GXR2Km44aBHJ1dWQ4ZaICSmixP-iD4oLU5HtrqtFLij5jnPVsOpiGYEVWLUmpzuatN9UpnZQPJJbYwVs2lBRZ8HZePPXZ0sboO63xjb6B-_nQEd1XgLYh2IMUV1lBfalW8Mcs2jArst-lAGAEByB5J3A).

Happy Teacher Appreciation Week to all the teachers nationwide. Thank you for all you do, and know that we are on your team.

Sincerely,

Bobby Jindal

If you would like to be removed from this email list, [please use this link](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=9f56537d40834998b07de37983b0056c&_t=c3M38CYb-EORQtL_ALpgfSDYsHw55qv3DdgeUB8YN6o3GwR9UwBQnEVErrpX9TmqJENLpcVydIyWrTsC12bAc4lMA8IG_LUbNt36I3Z1Nso3RSzekanngXRw2tYQ2y5tNgxnKQdzeM6hg0_r4wIExp9sUH_G0ir0dDyfBgBFBr0%3D).

Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320

We need to get the government, unions, and bureaucracy off the backs of teachers and parents, and bring education back to its primary job - to nurture the growth of students in every community. . Happy Teacher Appreciation Week to all the teachers nationwide. Thank you for all you do, and know that we are on your team. Sincerely, Bobby Jindal If you would like to be removed from this email list, . Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320

Thanks for all that you do,

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s Tariff Tactic is the Best Way to Finally Make China Stop Cheating
body:
President Donald J. Trump’s tariffs are the best way to finally make China stop cheating in international trade. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43fffb7497&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s Tariff Tactic is the Best Way to Finally Make China Stop Cheating**

President Donald J. Trump’s tariffs are the best way to finally make China stop cheating in international trade, Steven Mosher writes in the _New York Post_.

“The president held off raising tariffs on Chinese-made goods to 25 percent on March 1, as he had promised. The hope was that China, after decades of cheating on trade in every way imaginable, would finally agree to play by the rules . . . Then, [last] Friday, China attempted to rewrite a whole host of provisions it had previously agreed to,” Mosher explains.

“Unless China stops cheating, no deal may be the best deal of all. Trump understands this.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa23dc8d37&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Jerry Nadler has declared a constitutional crisis. The proximate cause is a couple of redacted lines, including one footnote, in a 400-page report. Let’s be glad for the sake of the republic that an entire page wasn’t withheld,” the _[National Review](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fbfcdee5ab&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “Nothing in the regulations required Attorney General Bill Barr to release any of the report, let alone release it in its entirety. He did anyway with minimal, entirely defensible redactions that the DOJ worked through with Mueller.”
---
|
---
| “China is a clear challenge to much the U.S. holds dear, and that gives Trump momentum to keep the pressure on China,” national security expert Rebecca Grant writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2490a4e7d5&e=3ee4985eea). America also has the upper hand, she says. “Trump picked the right moment for this showdown. The U.S. economy is growing and unemployment is at a 50-year low. In contrast, China’s economy isn’t booming. It's growing, but at the slowest rate in years.”
---
|
---
| Back in 2012, “Obama administration Attorney General Eric Holder had refused to comply with a Congressional subpoena for documents in the Fast and Furious investigation, Republicans argued at the time that Democrats should stand with us in defending our Congressional subpoena power. They refused,” former Chairman of the House Oversight Committee Jason Chaffetz (R-UT) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c4176363c&e=3ee4985eea). “America should not mistake this charade by the Democrats for a principled stand. Not when the principles shift with the political fortunes of the Democratic Party.”
---
|
---
| “Pharmaceutical giant Gilead Sciences will donate the anti-HIV drug Truvada to the federal government so it can move toward its goal to eliminate HIV transmission in a decade,” Kimberly Leonard reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a9b104833&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Great news today: My administration just secured a historic donation of HIV prevention drugs from Gilead to help expand access” for those at risk, President Trump wrote on Twitter yesterday.
---
|

---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Trump's kryptonite
body:
I believe I'm it, and let me tell you why.
| | |
---
| | **[Donald Trump raised more than $30 million for his reelection in the first three months of this year alone. We have to fight back. Rush a donation today to help Kirsten build the strongest campaign possible to defeat Trump>>](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977209/2ae112ef/6f198a0d/357c5b03/2036565230/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwOTktZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3099-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Peter,
Donald Trump has already raised more than $30 million to hold onto the White House. That's a massive war chest.
Democrats will need the strongest possible candidate as our nominee if we want to defeat him in 2020.
**I believe I 'm that candidate, and let me tell you why:** Trump's kryptonite is a woman who stands up for what she believes in and doesn't back down. His Achilles' heel is a woman who's running on issues that families care about.
That's me. I'm the candidate in the field who best fits the bill. **[But it won't be enough if we can't put up a fight against Trump's massive war chest--so can you make a donation today to help grow my campaign? We need to add 400 donors before midnight tonight, and every dollar helps me defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977209/2ae112ef/6f198a0d/357c5b03/2036565230/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwOTktZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3099-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

So yes, I'm "electable." But I'm also the best candidate to take on Trump, because I take on and win the fights no one else will. I've moved our country forward on health care, women's rights, LGBTQ rights, clean air and clean water, tackling underemployment and so much more.
I have a strong track record of doing big, bold things with bipartisan support. I've learned that to get anything done, you need to reach across the aisle, find common ground, lift up the voices that have been ignored for too long and fight for them.
People are suffering, and they need someone to care.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name to hold Big Pharma accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[It's past time for Congress to hold pharmaceutical companies accountable and bring down the prices of insulin and other life-saving drugs. Sign on now if you agree.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d4d/42ab3cf4/7cfaecfa/135d620f/2286339072/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/hold-big-pharma-accountable?source=em190510&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
For the more than 30 million Americans who are living with diabetes, access to insulin is a matter of life and death. But the prices for this drug are too high for many patients to afford.
The chief scientist who discovered insulin in 1923 believed that this life-saving drug should be available to everyone -- he even sold the patent for $1 so no one would make a profit on it.
Today, the unbridled greed of pharmaceutical companies is making insulin so expensive that a quarter of Americans with diabetes are now being forced to ration the drug they need to survive.
**[I am working to pass legislation in the Senate that will rein in Big Pharma and bring down drug prices for all Americans. Add your name if you're standing with me in this fight.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d4d/42ab3cf4/7cfaecfa/135d620f/2286339072/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/hold-big-pharma-accountable?source=em190510&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
What's even more outrageous than these out-of-control drug prices is the fact that Big Pharma is selling the exact same drugs at just a fraction of the cost in other countries like Canada and France. Why? Because those countries stood up to these companies and fought back.
It's time for Congress to take immediate action to protect Americans from the profit-driven greed of Big Pharma. I've introduced legislation like the FLAT Prices Act and the REMEDY Act to start tackling this crisis and I am urging my colleagues to join me and back these meaningful efforts.
**[Americans should never be forced to ration life-saving drugs like insulin. Sign now to join the fight to crack down on Big Pharma and bring drug prices down for all of us.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d4d/42ab3cf4/7cfaecfa/135d620f/2286339072/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/hold-big-pharma-accountable?source=em190510&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4d4d/42ab3cf4/7cfaecfa/135d620f/2286339072/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/hold-big-pharma-accountable?source=em190510&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Important numbers from Bernie and AOC
body:
They’re taking the fight to financial institutions who rip you off.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1313%2E150750%2ErcsaHt)

Bernie and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have some important numbers.
* **$113 billion:** how much Americans paid last year in interest on credit cards — 50 percent more than just five years ago.

* **35 percent:** how much of Macy’s and Kohl’s total income, at least, came from credit card interest they charge customers.

* **$1.4 billion:** how much JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon is worth, thanks to sky high fees, usurious interest rates, and plain Wall Street greed.

subject: There's a lot going on in this presidential primary. What do you think so far?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're building a grassroots movement to make real change. So, we wanted to check in: Are you all in? | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f999/45c30650/87bf14a6/66969417/2174319114/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Elizabeth knows that we need to dream big and fight hard to make Washington work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

That's why she's proposing bold ideas for big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

You name it, Elizabeth's got a plan for it -- from making sure the rich and powerful pay their fair share in taxes, to ensuring Universal Child Care, to cancelling student loan debt for 42 million Americans and making sure we never have another student loan debt crisis again.

The problems we face are systemic, and so are our solutions.

We're building a grassroots movement to make real change. It's going to take all of us pitching in.

**So, we wanted to check in: Are you all in to support Elizabeth?** | [**I'M ALL IN**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f999/45c30650/87bf14a6/66969416/2174319114/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDUxMGVtMS1ucy1uZC12MXMyIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-allin-0510?source=20190510em1-ns-nd-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

---

We're taking on the root causes of a corrupt system that rewards the rich and powerful.

People are coming together in Pennsylvania and across the country to build the grassroots movement that will end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy.

But in a crowded presidential primary, we need to do everything we can to make sure Elizabeth's voice stays front and center.

**[If you're all in to support Elizabeth, say so here.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f999/45c30650/87bf14a6/66969416/2174319114/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDUxMGVtMS1ucy1uZC12MXMyIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-allin-0510?source=20190510em1-ns-nd-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

But we also want to know if you're on the fence. It's early, after all! And there are so many candidates. _So many._

**[If you're not all in, share what you think of the campaign so far, and what you think we should build together.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f999/45c30650/87bf14a6/66969419/2174319114/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDUxMGVtMS1ucy1uZC12MXMyIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-notsure-0510?source=20190510em1-ns-nd-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Either way -- thanks for being in this fight.

Team Warren

[**I'M ALL IN**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f999/45c30650/87bf14a6/66969416/2174319114/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDUxMGVtMS1ucy1uZC12MXMyIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-allin-0510?source=20190510em1-ns-nd-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

body:
Congratulations to our party's municipal primary winners! Statewide, our local Republican elected officials share a sacred trust with Hoosiers... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/newly-minted-nominees?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5bb62858d1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Newly-Minted Nominees_** Congratulations to our party's municipal primary winners!

Statewide, our local Republican elected officials share a sacred trust with Hoosiers. From the Statehouse to city halls across the state, Hoosiers know that electing Republican leaders results in responsibly-managed tax dollars and great government service.

It's why Republicans continue to hold every statewide elected office, both U.S. Senate seats, seven U.S. House seats, 89% of county commissioner seats, and yes, the majority of Indiana mayor's offices.

Now that our candidates have officially secured the Republican nomination for mayoral, city council, town council and other important local races, it's time to help them build the campaign skills they'll need to cross the finish line FIRST in November!

We'll be working hard across the state this year to elect candidates who will deliver people-driven results in communities across the state, and as part of that, we have [a big municipal training seminar](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e91fb12c2b&e=1acd9bb3d6) planned for next month that we'd love to see as many candidates at as possible.

If you're a candidate whose name is on the ballot this year -- or if you're working for a candidate on the ballot this year -- [RSVP now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f8cd16f57&e=1acd9bb3d6) to attend Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana's Cities & Towns. [The seminar](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5e60bff1a&e=1acd9bb3d6), designed specifically for 2019 Republican municipal candidates and campaigns, will be on Saturday, June 15, at the University of Indianapolis.

[Click here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7474ce82e8&e=1acd9bb3d6) to learn more about the training seminar and to [register to attend](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c17b0077f6&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Congrats again to our newly-minted Republican nominees. Now let's get to work!

| **_Attracting Jobs & Saving Lives_**
_Governor Holcomb Delivering Results...And the Polls Show It!_ **Governor Holcomb** is delivering tangible results for Hoosiers, and Hoosiers are noticing. A new poll was released this week, and it shows Hoosiers giving Governor Holcomb very high marks for his job performance. Check out the poll [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48e30ddbca&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Hoosiers approve of Governor Holcomb's performance because he delivers for Hoosiers, including this week, when he signed the last remaining bills from the 2019 legislative session. This includes Indiana's perinatal care bill. This Next Level Agenda item will save the lives of Hoosier babies, with the goal of making Indiana home to the nation's lowest infant mortality rate by 2024.

As **Governor Holcomb** said, _“_ There are few — if any — things more important than protecting Hoosier babies and improving the lives and health of their mothers."

Read more about Indiana's [new perinatal care law here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ec81ec58d&e=1acd9bb3d6).

But **Governor Holcomb** didn't stop there this week. He also was in West Lafayette, where he joined **Purdue President Mitch Daniels** and global defense and security company Saab to help announce that the company is establishing a new advanced manufacturing and production facility in Indiana, with plans to create 300 new Hoosier aerospace jobs! Read more about these [great new jobs coming to Indiana here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=51400f81d2&e=1acd9bb3d6).

| **_Memorial Services Set for Senator Richard Lugar_** As Hoosiers, together we mourn the loss of **Richard Lugar** \-- a mayor, a senator, a visionary, a leader and a Hoosier.

**Senator Lugar** will lie in state at the Indiana Statehouse for 24 hours starting at noon on Tuesday, May 14. **Governor Holcomb** will commence the memorial service at noon in the Statehouse rotunda, and the public is welcome to visit the Statehouse through sunset on May 14 and from 8 a.m. to 11 a.m. on May 15 to pay their respects. The Lugar family will be available to greet well-wishers in the South Atrium of the Statehouse from 2 p.m. to 7 p.m. on May 14.

The funeral will then follow at St. Luke's United Methodist Church in Indianapolis at 1 p.m. It will be open to the public, and people will be welcomed in as space permits. The service will also be livestreamed online.

Memorial contributions can be directed to The Lugar Center to continue **Senator Lugar's** work on nonproliferation, global food security and bipartisan governance. You can contribute directly [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=790eb1f625&e=1acd9bb3d6).

| **_Mayor Pete Buttigieg's Bad Week_** It was a bad week for South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg. [A new poll shows](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8fa8db1427&e=1acd9bb3d6) that Buttigieg would lose his home state if the Democrats' 2020 Indiana primary were today, likely in part because he is simply bad at his job and isn't serving Hoosiers in South Bend very well (read [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82f010a6aa&e=1acd9bb3d6) about how local residents are dissatisfied with basic infrastructure and public safety service).

Yes, that's right -- Pete Buttigieg would come in _third_ in Indiana behind former Vice President Joe Biden and U.S. Senator (and admitted socialist) Bernie Sanders.

But Buttigieg's rough week doesn't stop there. That's because while he's out on the campaign trail saying taxpayers should pay for everyone's health care bills through a single-payer, "Medicare for All" government takeover of health care, he's [not even paying for health insurance](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1085e30198&e=1acd9bb3d6) for the people who are working on his campaign.

And yesterday, he attended a California fundraiser hosted by a film director who said that every Trump supporter is, well, it's too offensive to repeat his words here. [Click here to read](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c34761dc9&e=1acd9bb3d6) the revolting things he said about Americans who support our president.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: RE: a major announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
Politicians should not be beholden to their corporate special interest donors. If you agree, sign the petition: Call on every candidate in this race to REJECT corporate PAC money.
---
| | **This is a long email. But I hope you 'll take a moment to read the whole thing. It's important.** At the start of the last Congress, one of the first votes House Republicans took was on a bill designed to unravel protections for workers exposed to chemicals like beryllium. **Beryllium is one of the chemicals that poisoned my father 's lungs and caused his cancer. ** Watching House Republicans vote against the health and safety needs of people like my father in order to placate special interests left me sick. [_**I 've had enough. Republicans are beholden to special interests like the chemical industry and big oil. That's why I'm announcing I'm rejecting corporate PAC money. Will you sign my petition and call on every candidate in this race to reject corporate PAC money?**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b56a/18e32a7f/5a9fbbeb/7b9b0d17/2881251622/VEsH/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-survey?source=20190510_em_pet_b2_lujan_all") That first vote is indicative of the Republican Party. Last Congress, House Republicans raised taxes on and stripped health care from working Americans all to satisfy their corporate donors. Watching House Republicans put the interests of big corporations over hard-working Americans was the reason I worked so hard, as chairman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee last year, to elect a Democratic majority. **I knew a Democratic House majority would put people like my father and my constituents first. ** And we are. Our first major legislative vote: The For the People Act, a sweeping campaign finance package that would drastically curb the influence of big money in politics. The pride I felt watching that legislation, which I helped shepherd, pass in the House was matched only by the anger I felt when Mitch McConnell announced it was dead-on-arrival in the U.S. Senate. [_**This is not the way our government should work. Politicians should not be beholden to their corporate special interest donors. If you agree, sign the petition: Call on every candidate in this race to REJECT corporate PAC money.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b56a/18e32a7f/5a9fbbeb/7b9b0d17/2881251622/VEsE/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-survey?source=20190510_em_pet_b2_lujan_all") **McConnell 's decision to be a "Grim Reaper" for the good legislation we're championing in the House is one of the reasons I'm running for Senate. ** Because that's just not how it's supposed to work. In New Mexico, we work together for the good of the community. It's how I've spent my time in Congress and how I'll continue to work in the U.S. Senate. Whether that means securing millions of dollars in opioid treatment funding, protecting the 300,000 New Mexicans with pre-existing conditions, or introducing an ambitious plan to cut greenhouse gases by 60 percent -- my work is always for the people. **Today, I 'm taking that advocacy a step further: My campaign for the U.S. Senate will not accept corporate PAC money. ** This decision is at the core of the kind of campaign I'm running. A campaign run on New Mexican values that is built by the people, not corporations. I've spent more than a decade in public service speaking truth to power on behalf of New Mexican families and communities that haven't always had a voice in government. I've always put people first. I've fought to expand health care, solve the climate crisis, lower prescription drug prices, and pass monumental campaign finance reform. And I will work to earn your support to continue fighting on your behalf in the U.S. Senate. Thank you, Ben Ray | | [**CHIP IN NOW >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b56a/18e32a7f/5a9fbbeb/7b9b0d14/2881251622/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email/democratic-survey?refcode=20190510_em_pet_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---

|

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: [Policy] Hickenlooper HQ
subject: [SIGN NOW] Tell the NRA: Enough.
body:
On day 1 of his presidency, John's ready to take bold, progressive steps on gun control. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377164d/691c9bd/6c620aaf/11a48ce2/3158915725/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, this week in Colorado, yet another life--a young, promising life--was lost to our epidemic of gun violence.

**Enough.**

On day 1 of his presidency, John's ready to take bold, progressive steps on gun control. That includes going toe to toe with organizations that promote destructive agendas while turning a deliberate blind eye to our epidemic of violence--organizations like the NRA.

**Stand with John to tell the gun lobby: This is not the world we want to live in. We demand a safer, more sensible world, and we won 't back down till we get it.**
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377164d/691c9bd/6c620aaf/11a48ce3/3158915725/VEsE/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/send-the-nra-a-message?source=em_20190510") In 2016, the NRA poured over $30 million into Donald Trump's election. They're counting on his re-election to support their extremist goals, whether it's arming teachers in schools or letting the most dangerous weapons fall into the wrong hands. And you can count on this: They're terrified that someone like John will be elected president.

**That 's because as Colorado's Governor, John stood up to the NRA and won, making Colorado the first purple state to pass universal background checks and a ban on high-capacity magazines. **And as president, he'll work to take those rules nationwide, as well as extending waiting periods for gun purchases, funding gun violence research, passing red flag laws, and more--no matter how hard the gun lobby tries to block it.

**That 's the track record--and the vision--we need in our next president. Sign our petition now to send the NRA a message: We've had enough of their extremist agenda. We're standing tall. And we're fighting back.**
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377164d/691c9bd/6c620aaf/11a48ce3/3158915725/VEsF/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/send-the-nra-a-message?source=em_20190510")

Thank you,
Team Hickenlooper [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377164d/691c9bd/6c620aaf/11a48ce0/3158915725/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190510_PTH_20190510-fr-PTH-nra-all_all_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

****__** **__****
---

---
